data.title: Dune Analytics releases CLI and Skills framework for AI agents, providing direct blockchain data access on 130+ chains.
data.description: Dune has released a new CLI and Skills framework that enables AI agents to access blockchain data directly through terminals. This allows AI agents to interact with data from over 130 different chains autonomously, without requiring human intervention.

data.title: Johnson & Johnson highlights promising first-in-human Erda-iDRS (formerly TAR-210) results in intermediate-risk non-muscle-invasive bladder cancer
data.description: New data from EAU 2026 revealed that Erda-iDRS demonstrated an impressive 89% complete response rate in cases of intermediate-risk disease. The patients also experienced durable responses lasting over 18 months, along with a manageable safety profile. This treatment shows promise as a potential first targeted therapy for early-stage bladder cancer. The study was presented in Raritan, N.J. in March.

data.title: US sanctions six North Koreans and two entities for alleged $800 million fraud, targeting US companies with crypto scheme.
data.description: The United States imposed sanctions on six individuals and two entities from North Korea for their involvement in a cryptocurrency-driven fraud scam aimed at U.S. companies.

data.title: Great Sky Unveils Brain-like Computing Architecture Built for the Next Era of AI
data.description: A Colorado-based company, Great Sky, has unveiled its groundbreaking AI computing architecture. The company revealed its technology to the public along with successful fundraising and key commercial achievements. The superconducting optoelectronic innovation has attracted a substantial $14 million seed funding led by Bison Ventures. data.title: Security Federal Announces Corrected Dividend of $0.16 per share in Connection with its Previously Announced Quarterly Dividend
data.description: A company based in Aiken, South Carolina, known as Security Federal Corporation, the parent company of Security Federal Bank, recently issued a correction to their previous announcement. Initially, on March 2, 2026, the company had stated that a quarterly dividend of $0.15 per share would be distributed around March 15, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of February 28, 2026. However, they have now revised this dividend amount to $0.16 per share. The modification in dividend amount is the only change made, with all other terms and conditions remaining the same.

data.title: Injective (INJ) introduces AI toolkit with 11 open-source tools for autonomous trading agents to trade futures and deploy contracts.
data.description: Injective (INJ) has recently launched 11 open-source tools that allow AI agents to engage in trading perpetual futures, initiate contracts, and facilitate the bridging of assets by following natural language commands. These tools aim to enhance the efficiency and accessibility of these processes within the cryptocurrency space.

data.title: MoonPay Agents Introduces the First AI Agent Secured by a Ledger Signer
data.description: Autonomous AI agents are now able to engage in crypto trading, with each transaction being verified on a physical Ledger™ signer for enhanced security where private keys remain secure. The announcement was made in New York on March 13, 2026 by MoonPay, a prominent player in global crypto payments. MoonPay has introduced native Ledger signer support, allowing for securely conducted transactions within the crypto market.

data.title: FDA Broadens Access To GSK's Respiratory Syncytial Virus Shot For Younger High-Risk Adults
data.description: The FDA recently expanded the age approval for GSK plc's respiratory syncytial virus vaccine, Arexvy, to include adults between 18 and 49 years old who are at risk of lower respiratory tract disease from RSV. This vaccine was initially for those aged 60 and above, as well as for individuals aged 50-59 at risk of complications. Pregnant individuals are not eligible for this vaccine. Sanjay Gurunathan, GSK's head of vaccines and infectious diseases research and development, highlighted the importance of this expansion, citing the unmet medical needs of younger adults with underlying health conditions. This decision aims to protect at-risk individuals from severe RSV disease and alleviate healthcare system burdens.
